calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Appearances:
Richard Miller, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff, via ZOOM videoconference;
Isaac Lomeli, claimant/judgment debtor, appearing on his own behalf.

Hearing held. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Isaac Lomeli as follows:

Defendant's claim of exemption is denied. While Veterans Affairs ("VA") disability payments are exempt (see CCP 483.013), defendant fails to sufficiently trace the funds in the account to that source. (See CCP 703.080(b) [debtor's burden to show tracing].) Defendant's bank statement shows that VA funds were deposited on 12/23/22, but that same statement also shows that $2,120.80 of non-exempt funds were deposited into that account on the same date. Defendant's financial statement further shows that he has been servicing other debts that have not been reduced to judgment. Defendant should service the judgment in this case, which is over a decade old.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales;Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

After hearing, copies of the order were mailed to the parties and a certified true copy was mailed to the Orange County Sheriff's Department.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Off Calendar
